name: PER|FORMER
description: Open-source 8-track performance sequencer. 16 sequences × 64 steps per track, three track modes (Note/Curve/MIDI-CV), song mode with 64 slots, Launchpad integration, microSD storage.

controls.name: Encoder
controls.description: Rotary encoder with push-button. Edits values on selected field; long press and SHIFT combos open alternate functions.
controls.detail: Push to confirm · rotate to edit

controls.name: T1–T8 (Track buttons)
controls.description: Eight track-select buttons with bi-color LEDs. Indicate current track, activity, mute state. Hold + S-button for direct step selection.

controls.name: S1–S16 (Step buttons)
controls.description: Sixteen step buttons for step entry/edit. Hold step + rotate encoder to adjust its value; SHIFT+S for persistent selection.

controls.name: F1–F5 (Function buttons)
controls.description: Five context-sensitive function keys. Labels render on screen — meaning changes per page (page navigation, quick parameter edit).

controls.name: PLAY
controls.description: Start/stop master clock. SHIFT+PLAY pauses/restarts. PAGE+PLAY toggles recording mode.

controls.name: TEMP
controls.description: Temporary tempo display/edit. Holds over the tempo page without leaving current screen.

controls.name: PATT
controls.description: Temporary pattern selector. Hold to switch patterns; combine with S-buttons to launch per-track pattern.

controls.name: PERF
controls.description: Opens performer/mute interface for live mute-and-fill gestures per track.

controls.name: PREV / NEXT
controls.description: Page navigation. SHIFT+PREV/NEXT shifts steps left/right with wrap-around within the sequence.

controls.name: SHIFT / PAGE
controls.description: Modifier keys. SHIFT accesses alternate roles and edit modes; PAGE + Track/Step button enters specific pages directly.

inputs.name: CV IN 1–4
inputs.description: Four assignable CV inputs. Route to any global/track/sequence parameter via the routing matrix.

inputs.name: CLOCK IN
inputs.description: External analog clock input. Auto-detect in default clock mode.

inputs.name: RESET IN / RUN IN
inputs.description: Reset pulse input; run/stop input per setup.

inputs.name: MIDI IN (TRS)
inputs.description: MIDI input on 3.5mm TRS. Configurable Type-A/B. Accepts clock, notes, CC.

inputs.name: USB HOST
inputs.description: USB host port for class-compliant MIDI devices including Novation Launchpads and keyboards.

outputs.name: CV OUT 1–8
outputs.description: Eight CV outputs — one per track (or routed independently).

outputs.name: GATE OUT 1–8
outputs.description: Eight gate outputs — one per track. Gate length and retrigger configurable per step.

outputs.name: CLOCK OUT
outputs.description: Clock output. Division configurable from 1/768 to 4× quarter-note.

outputs.name: RESET OUT / RUN OUT
outputs.description: Reset and run outputs for slaving external gear.

outputs.name: MIDI OUT (TRS)
outputs.description: MIDI output for up to 8 simultaneous tracks as MIDI notes/CC.

behaviors.name: Three track modes
behaviors.description: Note mode — step sequencer with gate/pitch/velocity/mod layers. Curve mode — step-based modulation with curve shapes, adjustable min/max. MIDI/CV mode — MIDI-to-CV+gate with mono or poly operation plus built-in arpeggiator.

behaviors.name: Curve shapes
behaviors.trigger: Curve track · select shape per step
behaviors.description: Each step in Curve mode chooses from preset curve shapes (ramp up/down, expo, log, sine, step). Creates smooth CV modulation rather than stepped — sequence-driven envelope or LFO-like output per track.

behaviors.name: Arpeggiator
behaviors.description: Nine arp modes: Up, Down, Up/Down, Down/Up, Up&Down, Down&Up, Converge, Diverge, Random. Octave expansion up to multiple octaves. Fed by MIDI input; outputs on the track's CV/gate pair.

behaviors.name: Run modes
behaviors.description: Forward, Backward, Pendulum, Ping-Pong, Random, Random Walk playback. Combined with per-track divisor (1/1 to 1/768) and rotation offset, creates non-linear generative sequencing from fixed patterns.

behaviors.name: Play modes (Aligned vs Free)
behaviors.description: Aligned: step position derives from elapsed time — deterministic, predictable. Free: step advances relative to previous position — 'analog' feel where tempo changes shift phase. Aligned recommended for most uses.

behaviors.name: Step conditions
behaviors.description: Conditions gate step firing: Fill (only during fill), !Fill, First (only first pass), !First, Pre (follows prior step condition), !Pre, N:M iteration (e.g. 2:4 = every 2nd of 4 cycles). Layer multiple tracks with different N:M for evolving polymeters.

behaviors.name: Song mode
behaviors.description: 64 slots per song. Each slot references 8 patterns (one per track) plus bars/measures count. Chain slots for linear arrangement; pattern-chain mode allows fast live pattern launching across tracks.

behaviors.name: Snapshot system
behaviors.description: Captures temporary pattern copy for real-time editing without touching the original. Revert to restore, commit to save — safe live tweaking without destroying source patterns.

behaviors.name: Routing matrix
behaviors.description: Up to 16 routes. Maps 4 CV inputs, 8 CV outputs (for cross-track mod without patching), and MIDI controllers (pitch bend, CC, notes) to global (Tempo/Swing), track (Transpose, Octave, Slide, Rotation), and sequence (First/Last Step, Divisor, Scale, Run Mode) parameters.

behaviors.name: Scale system
behaviors.description: 24 preset scales — chromatic, western modes, world scales, equal temperaments from 5-TET to 24-TET — plus 4 user scales with semitone or voltage mode (-5V to +5V). Per-sequence, so different tracks/patterns can use different tunings.

behaviors.name: Launchpad grid integration
behaviors.description: Supports Mini MK1-3, S, MK2, Pro, X. Sequence Mode: 64×64 virtual grid for step editing on hardware grid. Pattern Mode: column = track launch, row = scene. Mute/fill/toggle via shift combos.

behaviors.name: Recording modes
behaviors.description: Overdub (non-destructive add), Overwrite (replace), Step Record (sequential note entry). Accepts CV/gate from inputs or MIDI notes from USB/TRS.

behaviors.name: microSD project storage
behaviors.description: Projects, user scales, and system settings saved to microSD (slots 0-127 each). Calibration stored separately in flash. Swap cards or back up sessions without losing tunings.

behaviors.name: Clock auto-master/slave
behaviors.description: Auto-detects signal on CLOCK IN or MIDI clock and switches to slave; falls back to master when absent. Internal master runs at 192 PPQN. Tempo 1–1000 BPM, tap tempo, ±10% nudging for DJ sync.

behaviors.name: Step slide and micro-timing
behaviors.description: Each Note step has Slide (glides pitch from prior step) and per-step timing nudge. Combined with track Slide Time parameter (routable), enables portamento phrasing without a dedicated slew module.

patchIdeas.name: 8-voice polyphonic rig
patchIdeas.patch: all 8 tracks Note mode · each track one voice · CV OUT n to VCO n, GATE OUT n to envelope n · 8 independent monophonic sequences for 8 VCOs · or use MIDI/CV poly mode on one track driving 8 CV+gate pairs
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* Tracks 1-8: Note mode
* Scale: Minor

VCO 1:
VCO 2:

- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 1) g> Envelope 1 (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 2) g> Envelope 2 (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (CLOCK OUT) c> External (Clock)

patchIdeas.name: Curve-mode LFO bank
patchIdeas.patch: tracks 5-8 Curve mode with different shapes · per-track divisors /1, /2, /3, /4 · creates bank of related LFOs · mutate via Rotation routed to a CV input
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* Tracks 5-8: Curve mode
* T5 divisor /1, T6 /2, T7 /3, T8 /4
* Routing: CV IN 1 → T5 Rotation

Filter:
VCA:

- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 5) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 6) >> Filter (Resonance)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 7) >> VCA (CV)
- LFO (Out) >> PER|FORMER (CV IN 1) // mutate

patchIdeas.name: Euclidean polymeter
patchIdeas.patch: track 1 16 steps, divisor /1 · track 2 13 steps /1 · track 3 7 steps /1 · step conditions N:M = 2:3, 3:5, 1:4 on accent steps · evolving poly-rhythm from short patterns
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* T1: 16 steps /1, cond. 2:3 on step 1
* T2: 13 steps /1
* T3: 7 steps /1, cond. 3:5 on step 1

Drum 1:
Drum 2:
Drum 3:

- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 1) t> Drum 1 (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 2) t> Drum 2 (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 3) t> Drum 3 (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Launchpad step-entry live
patchIdeas.patch: Launchpad connected via USB host · Sequence Mode enabled · tap grid pads to program patterns during playback · switch to Pattern Mode for live pattern launching per track
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* USB: Launchpad
* Performance: Sequence Mode

VCO:

- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 1) g> Envelope (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: CV-recorded melody
patchIdeas.patch: PAGE+PLAY record mode · Overdub · external keyboard CV into CV IN 1 via routing to T1 pitch · gate from keyboard into CV IN 2 · hit play and play keyboard live · quantized to sequence scale
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* Recording: Overdub
* Routing: CV IN 1 → T1 Pitch, CV IN 2 → T1 Gate
* T1 Scale: Pentatonic

Keyboard:

- Keyboard (CV) p> PER|FORMER (CV IN 1)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> PER|FORMER (CV IN 2)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: MIDI arp to CV
patchIdeas.patch: track 1 MIDI/CV mode with Arp Up/Down · external MIDI keyboard via USB host · hold chord · arp output on CV OUT 1 + GATE OUT 1 · sequence modulation on track 2-3 as classical arp accompaniment
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* T1: MIDI/CV, Arp Up/Down, 2 octaves
* USB: MIDI Keyboard

VCO:
Filter:

- Keyboard (MIDI) >> PER|FORMER (USB HOST)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 1) g> Envelope (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Snapshot live remix
patchIdeas.patch: PERF button · take snapshot of pattern · live edit steps while playing · revert on demand to original · perform variations without touching source patterns · commit best takes
patchIdeas.diagram:
PER|FORMER:
* PERF: snapshot active

VCO:

- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 1) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- PER|FORMER (GATE OUT 1) g> Envelope (Trig)
- PER|FORMER (CV OUT 2) >> Filter (Cutoff) // modulated live
